name: domino-lss-lotusscript
description: Syntax highlighting and language basics for LotusScript and HCL Domino .lss library source files.

commands.title: Open HCL Domino Designer help in browser
Insert agent skeleton (Initialize + NotesLog + error handler)
Toggle 'Option Declare' at top of file

domino-lss-lotusscript.requireAsciiComme.description: Warn when comments contain non-ASCII characters, to encourage English-only comments.

domino-lss-lotusscript.enableHclDocCompl.description: Suggest LotusScript built-ins and Notes classes with links to HCL Domino Designer online help.

domino-lss-lotusscript.enableHclDocHover.description: Show HCL documentation links when hovering identifiers (built-ins, Notes classes, common keywords).

domino-lss-lotusscript.helpVersion.description: Version segment for HCL URLs only (e.g. 14.5.1). Do not paste a full URL here. Overview: https://help.hcl-software.com/dom_designer/14.5.1/basic/domino_designer_basic_user_guide_and_reference.html

domino-lss-lotusscript.membersOnlyAfterD.description: After obj., show only curated HCL-style Notes members when obj is Dim … As Notes* (or Sub/Function param). Otherwise show an empty list. Turn off to fall back to general suggestions after unknown objects.

domino-lss-lotusscript.warnMissingOption.description: Hint when a .lss file has no 'Option Declare', which makes implicit Variant declarations possible.

domino-lss-lotusscript.highlightTodos.description: Surface TODO / FIXME / XXX / HACK / BUG markers from comments in Problems.

domino-lss-lotusscript.checkStructuralBl.description: Warn about unclosed or mismatched Sub/Function/Property/Class/If/For/Do/While/With/Select Case blocks.

domino-lss-lotusscript.enableCodeLens.description: Show 'Open <NotesClass> in HCL help' code lenses above declarations.

domino-lss-lotusscript.enableReferenceCo.description: Show 'N references' code lenses above Sub/Function/Property/Class declarations (resolved lazily).

domino-lss-lotusscript.enableStatusBar.description: Show the current Class.Method/Sub/Function in the status bar.

domino-lss-lotusscript.enableSemanticTok.description: Enable semantic token classification so user-defined symbols, Notes classes, parameters and deprecated calls can be themed separately.

domino-lss-lotusscript.warnFallThroughEr.description: Warn when execution can fall through into an ErrorHandler: label without an explicit Exit Sub/Function/Property.

domino-lss-lotusscript.warnSetNewWithout.description: Warn when 'Set x = New ClassName' uses a variable that was not previously declared with 'Dim x As ClassName'.

domino-lss-lotusscript.warnDeprecatedCal.description: Flag deprecated LotusScript calls (e.g. Lsi_info → GetThreadInfo) and offer a quick fix to the canonical replacement.

domino-lss-lotusscript.warnMagicMsgboxCo.description: Hint when Msgbox is called with numeric literals for buttons/icons; suggest using MB_* named constants from lsconst.lss.

domino-lss-lotusscript.warnNotesClassTyp.description: Suggest the closest Notes* class name (Levenshtein) when 'As [New] Notes…' references an unknown class.

domino-lss-lotusscript.warnUnusedSymbols.description: Hint when local variables, parameters, or private class members are declared but never used.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with LotusScript & .lss
walkthroughs.description: Tour the highlight, hover, completion, diagnostics and refactoring features for HCL Domino LotusScript.

steps.title: Open a .lss file
steps.description:
Open any `.lss` file (or use the bundled sample) to activate the extension. The status bar will show the current Class.Method.
[Open sample](command:vscode.open?%5B%22examples%2Fdemo.lss%22%5D)

steps.title: Hover for HCL help
steps.description: Hover over any built-in (`Msgbox`, `Boolean`), Notes class (`NotesDatabase`), constant (`ATTR_DIRECTORY`), or directive (`%Include`) to see HCL Domino Designer documentation links.

steps.title: Lint & quick fixes
steps.description: Open the Problems panel — the extension warns about missing `Option Declare`, fall-through `ErrorHandler:`, deprecated calls, magic Msgbox constants and likely Notes* class typos. Many warnings come with a Quick Fix (Ctrl+. / Cmd+.).

steps.title: Find references, rename, generate %REM
steps.description: Right-click any identifier for `Find All References`, `Rename Symbol`, or open Quick Fix on a `Sub`/`Function`/`Property` declaration to insert an error-handler skeleton or generate a `%REM` documentation block.

steps.title: Tune to your team's style
steps.description:
Search settings for `domino-lss-lotusscript` to enable/disable each diagnostic, change the HCL help version, or hide CodeLenses.
[Open settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22domino-lss-lotusscript%22)
